en.text: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7489 {properly, to spoil (literally, by breaking to pieces); figuratively, to make (or be) good fornothing, i.e. bad (physically, socially or morally)}

senses.gloss_en: (Aramaic) corresponding to H7489 {properly, to spoil (literally, by breaking to pieces); figuratively, to make (or be) good fornothing, i.e. bad (physically, socially or morally)}
